column1: # Main impounded-pool low-water datum: Stauziel (impoundment target level) per barrage
# plus the barrage's weir line (two endpoints across the channel) used as the exact pool divider.
# The lower/canalised Main is a staircase of pools; each barrage holds the reach UPSTREAM of its
# weir at a fixed Stauziel. build_reference.py assigns each pixel the Stauziel of the barrage whose
# weir line is immediately downstream of it — so the step lands exactly on the dam
# interpolated point. Complete where the PEGELONLINE gauges (main_zs.csv
# Eddersheim and Offenbach pools have no gauge).
# km + stauziel: Wikipedia "Liste der Mainstaustufen" (Stauziel in m ü. NN ~= NHN)

column4: lat2: endpoints of the OSM `man_made=weir` way across the channel (WGS84)
